segments.text: If you are confused if this is the right person for you, keep listening. Think about a jigsaw puzzle. Two pieces are not the most perfect pieces in the
world, but they fit well with each other. The dents on one puzzle piece accommodates the dents on the other puzzle piece. We human beings are the
same. How do my imperfections fit in with their imperfections? If I'm somebody who has a lot of questions, who overthinks a lot, I need somebody who can overcommunicate. Having said that,
it does not mean that you always find a way to justify your imperfections because they fit well with the other person. Sometimes a partner who is
dramatically different from you can actually help you look at your blind spots and fix them. We don't get to not learn our lessons. We don't get to not
suffer. We just have to pick who we want to suffer with and what are the things that are worth suffering for. Because at the end of the suffering is the
individual you've always wanted to become. Think about it.
